name: pcs-facet-enrichment-pipeline
description: End-to-end faceted-search enrichment: take an Anglera Faceted Search Backfill export, run a coverage gap analysis, back-fill blank attributes with HIGH-confidence values scanned from the products' real source PDPs, then output a NetSuite-ready facet import. Built for a non-technical operator — Claude automates ingest, gap analysis, scraper config, QA, and NetSuite formatting; the operator only drops the file and double-clicks a one-click runner.
